title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
